name: ER and Golgi Isolation by Sucrose Density Gradient
nameCn: 内质网与高尔基体分离（蔗糖密度梯度法）

components.name: 1. Seed 1–2×10⁸ cells; wash 2× PBS; scrape in cold sucrose_gradient_homog buffer

note.en: Use 5 mL buffer per 10⁸ cells. Soft tissue (liver): 100–500 mg tissue, mince and wash. All steps 4°C.
note.zh: 每 10⁸ 细胞用 5 mL 缓冲液。软组织（肝脏）：100–500 mg，切碎后洗涤。全程 4°C。

components.name: 2. Homogenize: 30–40 Dounce strokes (tight pestle) until >80% cell lysis

note.en: Check by trypan blue every 10 strokes. ER is fragile — do not over-homogenize. N₂ cavitation (600–800 psi, 15 min) is gentler and gives higher ER yield.
note.zh: 每 10 次检查台盼蓝。ER 脆弱——勿过度匀浆。氮气空化（600–800 psi，15 min）更温和，ER 产量更高。

note.en: Postnuclear supernatant (PNS) contains all organelles except nuclei.
note.zh: 核后上清（PNS）含除核以外的所有细胞器。

note.en: Post-mitochondrial supernatant (PMS). Save 100 µL for WB input.
note.zh: 线粒体后上清（PMS）。保存 100 µL 作 WB 投入量对照。

components.name: 5. Crude microsome pellet: 100,000×g, 60 min, 4°C (Ti-70.1 or SW-55)

note.en: Pellet = crude microsomes (ER + Golgi + endosomes + plasma membrane fragments). Supernatant = cytosol. Resuspend crude microsomes in 0.5 mL 250 mM sucrose buffer.
note.zh: 沉淀 = 粗微粒体（ER + Golgi + 内体 + 质膜碎片）。上清 = 细胞质。粗微粒体用 0.5 mL 250 mM 蔗糖缓冲液重悬。

components.name: 6. Prepare discontinuous sucrose gradient in ultracentrifuge tube (SW-41 Ti, 11 mL)

note.en: Layer from bottom (pipette carefully, do not mix): 2.0 M sucrose (1.5 mL) → 1.3 M (3 mL) → 1.15 M (3 mL) → 0.86 M (2 mL). Load sample on top (0.5 mL). Place on ice.
note.zh: 从底部开始（小心不混层）：2.0 M 蔗糖（1.5 mL）→ 1.3 M（3 mL）→ 1.15 M（3 mL）→ 0.86 M（2 mL）。样品（0.5 mL）加在顶部。置于冰上。

components.name: 7. Ultracentrifuge: 100,000×g (25,000 rpm SW-41), 16–18 h, 4°C, no brake

note.en: Long spin for equilibrium banding. Slow acceleration (accel 3) and no brake (decel 0).
note.zh: 长时间离心达到平衡成带。慢加速（3 档）、无刹车（0 档）。

components.name: 8. Collect fractions from top (0.5–1 mL/fraction) using fraction collector or manual pipetting

note.en: Expected positions: Golgi (1.08–1.10 g/mL, at 0.86 M/1.15 M interface) and rough ER (1.17–1.20 g/mL, at 1.3 M/2.0 M interface). Smooth ER bands lighter (~1.14 g/mL).
note.zh: 预期位置：高尔基体（1.08–1.10 g/mL，0.86 M/1.15 M 界面）；粗面内质网（1.17–1.20 g/mL，1.3 M/2.0 M 界面）。光面 ER 较轻（~1.14 g/mL）。

components.name: 9. Identify fractions by Western blot markers

note.en: ER markers: Calnexin (transmembrane), PDI/PDIA3 (luminal), KDEL (lumenal). Golgi markers: GM130 (cis-Golgi), TGN46 (trans-Golgi). Dilute fractions 5× in PBS before WB.
note.zh: ER 标记：Calnexin（跨膜）、PDI/PDIA3（腔内）、KDEL（腔内序列）。高尔基标记：GM130（顺式）、TGN46（反式）。Western blot 前将组分用 PBS 稀释 5 倍。

components.name: 10. Pool and pellet organelle fractions: dilute 5×; 100,000×g 60 min 4°C

note.en: Removes sucrose. Resuspend in desired buffer (e.g., 50 mM HEPES pH 7.4, 150 mM NaCl, 1 mM EDTA). Protein yield: ~5–50 µg ER per 10⁷ cells.
note.zh: 去除蔗糖。用目标缓冲液（如 50 mM HEPES pH 7.4、150 mM NaCl、1 mM EDTA）重悬。蛋白产量：约 5–50 µg ER/10⁷ 细胞。

notes.en: Alternative for Golgi: immunoprecipitation of Golgi membranes using anti-GM130 coated beads (faster, requires antibody). For live-cell ER/Golgi imaging: ER-Tracker (Thermo) or BODIPY-ceramide. Cross-contamination monitoring is essential — include mitochondria (COX IV), PM (Na/K-ATPase), lysosome (LAMP1) markers.
notes.zh: 高尔基体替代法：anti-GM130 磁珠免疫沉淀（更快，需要抗体）。活细胞 ER/Golgi 成像：ER-Tracker（Thermo）或 BODIPY-ceramide。必须监测交叉污染——包含线粒体（COX IV）、质膜（Na/K-ATPase）、溶酶体（LAMP1）标记。

ref: Bhatt et al. (2021) STAR Protoc 2:100450; Graham (2001) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 3.8.1; Barr (2013) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 59:3.29.1

materials.name: Cells or tissue (>10⁸ cells or >1 g tissue)
Sucrose gradient solutions (0.25 M, 0.5 M, 0.86 M, 1.3 M)

usage.en: Isolate endoplasmic reticulum and Golgi membrane fractions by sucrose density gradient centrifugation.
usage.zh: 蔗糖密度梯度离心分离内质网和高尔基体膜组分。

note.en: Post-nuclear supernatant (PNS) can be kept on ice for up to 1 h before further fractionation
note.zh: 核后上清（PNS）可在冰上保存 1 h 后再进一步分级

note.en: Crude microsome pellet can be snap-frozen at −80°C for up to 1 week
note.zh: 粗微粒体沉淀可 −80°C 速冻保存 1 周

note.en: Purified ER/Golgi fractions in aliquots can be stored at −80°C for up to 1 month
note.zh: 纯化的 ER/Golgi 组分分装后可 −80°C 保存 1 个月

detailedSteps.en: Seed 1–2×10⁸ cells. Wash 2× with cold PBS. Scrape cells in cold sucrose homogenization buffer (5 mL per 10⁸ cells). For tissue: mince 100–500 mg, wash with cold buffer
detailedSteps.zh: 准备 1–2×10⁸ 细胞。冷 PBS 洗 2 次。用冷蔗糖匀浆缓冲液（每 10⁸ 细胞 5 mL）刮取细胞。组织：切碎 100–500 mg，冷缓冲液洗涤

detailedSteps.en: Homogenize with 30–40 Dounce strokes (tight pestle) until >80% cell lysis. Check by trypan blue every 10 strokes. Alternatively: N₂ cavitation (600–800 psi, 15 min) for gentler ER-preserving lysis
detailedSteps.zh: Dounce 匀浆器 30–40 次（紧配研杵）直至 >80% 细胞裂解。每 10 次用台盼蓝检查。替代方法：氮气空化（600–800 psi，15 min）更温和保护 ER

detailedSteps.en: Remove nuclei/debris: 600×g, 10 min, 4°C. Repeat once. Keep post-nuclear supernatant (PNS)
detailedSteps.zh: 去除细胞核/碎片：600×g 离心 10 min，4°C。重复 1 次。保留核后上清（PNS）

detailedSteps.en: Remove mitochondria: 5,000×g, 10 min, 4°C. Keep post-mitochondrial supernatant (PMS). Save 100 µL for WB input
detailedSteps.zh: 去除线粒体：5,000×g 离心 10 min，4°C。保留线粒体后上清（PMS）。取 100 µL 作 WB 投入量

detailedSteps.en: Pellet crude microsomes: 100,000×g, 60 min, 4°C. Resuspend pellet in 0.5 mL 250 mM sucrose buffer. Supernatant = cytosol (save aliquot)
detailedSteps.zh: 沉淀粗微粒体：100,000×g 离心 60 min，4°C。用 0.5 mL 250 mM 蔗糖缓冲液重悬沉淀。上清 = 细胞质（留样）

detailedSteps.en: Prepare discontinuous sucrose gradient in SW-41 Ti tube (11 mL): layer from bottom — 2.0 M (1.5 mL) → 1.3 M (3 mL) → 1.15 M (3 mL) → 0.86 M (2 mL). Load sample (0.5 mL) on top
detailedSteps.zh: 在 SW-41 Ti 管（11 mL）中制备不连续蔗糖梯度：从底部分层 — 2.0 M（1.5 mL）→ 1.3 M（3 mL）→ 1.15 M（3 mL）→ 0.86 M（2 mL）。样品（0.5 mL）加在顶部

detailedSteps.en: Ultracentrifuge: 100,000×g (25,000 rpm SW-41), 16–18 h, 4°C. Slow acceleration (setting 3), no brake (decel 0)
Collect 0.5–1 mL fractions from top. Golgi bands at 0.86 M/1.15 M interface (density 1.08–1.10 g/mL). Rough ER bands at 1.3 M/2.0 M interface (density 1.17–1.20 g/mL). Smooth ER ~1.14 g/mL
detailedSteps.zh: 从顶部收集 0.5–1 mL 组分。Golgi 在 0.86 M/1.15 M 界面（密度 1.08–1.10 g/mL）。粗面 ER 在 1.3 M/2.0 M 界面（密度 1.17–1.20 g/mL）。光面 ER ~1.14 g/mL

detailedSteps.en: Validate by Western blot: ER markers (Calnexin, PDI, KDEL), Golgi markers (GM130, TGN46). Include contamination controls: COX IV (mito), Na/K-ATPase (PM), LAMP1 (lysosome)
detailedSteps.zh: Western blot 验证：ER 标记（Calnexin、PDI、KDEL），Golgi 标记（GM130、TGN46）。包含污染对照：COX IV（线粒体）、Na/K-ATPase（质膜）、LAMP1（溶酶体）

detailedSteps.en: Pool target fractions, dilute 5× in PBS, pellet at 100,000×g 60 min 4°C to remove sucrose. Resuspend in desired buffer. Aliquot and store at −80°C
detailedSteps.zh: 合并目标组分，PBS 稀释 5 倍，100,000×g 离心 60 min 4°C 去除蔗糖。用目标缓冲液重悬。分装 −80°C 保存

briefSteps.en: Harvest cells → Dounce homogenize → 600×g remove nuclei → 5,000×g remove mito → 100,000×g pellet microsomes → sucrose gradient (0.86/1.15/1.3/2.0 M) → ultracentrifuge 16–18 h → collect Golgi & ER fractions → WB validate → pool & pellet
briefSteps.zh: 收获细胞 → Dounce 匀浆 → 600×g 去核 → 5,000×g 去线粒体 → 100,000×g 沉淀微粒体 → 蔗糖梯度（0.86/1.15/1.3/2.0 M）→ 超离 16–18 h → 收集 Golgi 和 ER 组分 → WB 验证 → 合并沉淀
